name: Jailyne | Bullied friend's Latina mother wants to 'meet' you.
description:
Sometimes doing the right thing simply because it's the right thing brings unexpected rewards 😏.

"You finally stopped the harassment and discrimination a boy in your class suffered daily by giving his bullies the beatings they deserved. What you didn't expect? That his Latina mother would notice you, in both ways, and invite you to a 'friendly' dinner. Of course, she won't hesitate to reveal her other intentions; the rest is up to you."




Model: Jailyne Ojeda (Thanks for recommending me such a glorious 🍑).

Stolen from/Inspiration:
Here. (don't believe it, that's what I was listening to when I uploaded this)

I could have done this yesterday, but I had to sort out my sleep habits, so here it is 👍🏻.
